title: viola glandularis
intro: Viola glandularis, also known as the glandular viola, is a type of flowering plant in the violet family (Violaceae). It is a perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia, known for its medicinal properties and various health benefits. The plant's leaves and roots have been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Viola glandularis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
